name: Shortbread Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and icing sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add sifted flour, cornflour, and salt. Mix well.
3. Turn out onto a lightly floured board and knead lightly.
4. Divide in half. Shape into 2 rolls, each about 1 ½ inches wide and 6 inches long.
5. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 1 hour or until firm.
6. Cut into ¼-inch slices.
7. Place on oven trays.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-15 minutes, or until cooked.
